creator: rainer@ultra-secure.de
text:
David W. Chapman Jr. writes:

> Does this still happen?

Yes,
to be more precise, I get this error, when I use the external-command
facility and restart the netsaint-process via a administration-GUI called
"NEAT".
I don't get this error when I restart it via "reload" as root. 

Personally, I don't need the web-interface, but this installation will
sometimes be managed by people who perfer "the other OS".... 

BTW: between the PR and your mail, I have reinstalled FreeBSD and Netsaint
on a quasi-production machine and the error is still there. 


cheers,
Rainer
--
